Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8000 "QIX-8000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Qix.prg"
Metadata.Notes: 1. Patched $C2E0 to RTS ($60) to prevent trying to reload the title screen from disk after the instructions are shown 2. Changed the JMP instruction at $8084 to jump to $8072 instead of $8055 to prevent trying to show the title screen again. This causes the instructions to be displayed again. 3. Patched the JSR $C61E instruction at $C001 to be JMP $C00A instead to skip the display and wipe of the title screen which is no longer in memory 4. Changed the JMP instructions at $160F and $8D86 to jump to $4010 instead of $1B97 after the game over message is displayed 5. Added a small routine at $4010 to wait for the fire button in port 2 to be pressed. Once pressed, it jumps to $8178 to prevent trying to reload the title screen from disk. This causes the game to simply restart in the previously selected mode (i.e. 1 player, 2 player or practice). 6. NOP'd out the JSR call at $166B to remove long delay after level completed music has finished playing 7. NOP'd out the JSR call at $1682 to remove disk check
